title: Low Gravity
body:
Moon modpack anyone? Experience low gravity in all dimensions.

Air manuerverability is increased, allowing you to just barely leap up to 2 block high heights.

Fall damage is massively reduced. You may fall from up to 30 blocks with no damage upon impact.

I personally love hitting mobs off cliffs and watching them glide through the sky.

Unload the mod with `/function low_gravity:unload`

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
